alchemical hydra.note: Wiki: alternates 3 ranged / 3 magic at 17 default (correctly lured); empowered (26) and the faster final phase (up to 55) not modeled; avoidable phase specials left unallocated.

artio.note: Wiki: melee (35) only partially blocked by Protect from Melee - modeled as unblockable 18; magic 50 and ranged 17 prayable; no frequency - uniform.; melee TRUE max 35, Protect from Melee halves it (factor 0.5)

callisto.note: Wiki: melee (55) is only ~50% reduced by Protect from Melee - modeled as unblockable 28; ranged 31 and the magic shockwave 50 fully prayable; no frequency - uniform.; melee TRUE max 55, Protect from Melee halves it (factor 0.5)

calvar'ion.note: Wiki: Vet'ion's mechanics at max hit 26; lightning and shield bash are dodge-based, no prayer reduction documented - modeled as unblockable.

cerberus.note: Wiki: all three styles max 23 (no frequency - uniform); summoned souls hit 30 hp if the matching prayer is down (30 prayer if up) - modeled as unblockable chip; lava pools and the triple-attack combo avoidable.

chaos elemental.note: Wiki: Discord deals melee, ranged or magic damage (max 28); Confusion (teleport) and Madness (unequip) deal no damage - shares approximate; all prayable.

commander zilyana.note: Wiki: very fast (2t) melee 27 / magic 20, magic used at melee distance with a min hit of 10; no frequency given - uniform. Both prayable.

corporeal beast.note: Wiki: in melee range melee 40% / magic 60%; Protect from Magic only blocks 1/3 of the 65 magic max - modeled as unblockable 43; stomp (30-51, under him) avoidable - omitted.; magic TRUE max 65, prayer blocks 1/3 (factor 0.667)

general graardor.note: Wiki: melee 2/3, room-wide ranged 1/3 (even 15-35, so max 35 not the derived 58); both fully prayable.

k'ril tsutsaroth.note: Wiki: melee 2/3 and magic 1/3; 1 in 9 hits is the prayer-smash spec (35-49, 2/27 overall) that pierces Protect from Melee and halves prayer points.

king black dragon.note: Wiki: melee 25; normal dragonfire 65 and shock/ice/poison dragonfire 50 vs an unprotected player - uniform across the five attacks; shield/antifire mitigation unmodeled.

kree'arra.note: Wiki: primarily ranged (69) with secondary magic (21); melee (25) only vs players not targeting him, omitted. Both prayable.

spindel.note: Wiki: melee 14 / ranged 31 / magic 24, Venenatis mechanics at lower values; all prayable; no frequency - uniform.

venenatis.note: Wiki: melee 21 / ranged 35 / magic 30, all fully prayable, but spiderlings degrade prayer effectiveness (unmodeled); sticky-web chip unmodeled; no frequency - uniform.

vet'ion.note: Wiki: tile-targeted lightning (max 44) and the shield bash (35, melee range) are dodge-based; no prayer reduction documented - modeled as unblockable; hellhound adds and enrage speed-up unmodeled.

vorkath.note: Wiki (post-quest): ranged 32 / magic 30 / dragonfire up to 80 unprotected; 2 of every 8 attacks are the avoidable specials (spawn, acid) - left unallocated; melee only adjacent - omitted; shield/antifire mitigation unmodeled.

zulrah.note: Wiki: 41 ranged/magic across the serpentine and tanzanite forms (approximate phase mix); magma tail slam (30) is typeless and dodgeable; snakelings and venom unmodeled.
